case_title: TENERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC,INC VS. SHAWN SCOTT et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT, SHAWN
